resultList.dtldesc: Discover a spectacular opportunity to own a premium independent residence situated in one of the most prominent corridors of East Bangalore. This impressive east-facing villa is perfectly positioned for those who appreciate space, luxury, and an unbeatable location. Overlooking a wide 12-metre main road, the freehold property is incredibly versatile, making it highly ideal for luxurious independent living or potential commercial development. Offering complete privacy and a grand presence, it stands as an exceptional asset for long-term investment.::::Property Specifications::This individual villa spans a generous super area of 2,500 sq. ft, featuring an intelligent architectural layout designed across three floors. The semi-furnished residence comprises three spacious bedrooms and three well-appointed bathrooms, ensuring optimal convenience for the entire household. It also features a lovely balcony that serves as a relaxing outdoor getaway. Adding to its exceptional functionality, the layout includes four additional rooms, providing designated areas for a puja room, a study, a store room, and a servant room. Elegant marble flooring runs throughout the home, creating a sophisticated and classic interior ambience.::::Facilities::The residence is backed by essential and highly reliable utility systems to ensure a premium, hassle-free lifestyle. It benefits from a constant 24-hour water supply and features a highly stable electricity connection with rare to no power cuts. The property structure is officially approved by the Bangalore Development Authority, guaranteeing absolute peace of mind regarding compliance. Located on a road with very limited residential traffic, the setup ensures an exclusive and peaceful environment for the inhabitants.::::Locality::Perfectly situated on Whitefield Main Road, this villa commands a highly prestigious address surrounded by elite landmarks. It is located directly opposite Four Seasons by Sheraton and is in close proximity to Coffee Day, adding a distinct touch of convenience and lifestyle appeal. Families will find top-tier schooling options nearby, such as the Vydehi School of Excellence just two kilometres away, while major shopping destinations like Park Square Mall are located within a brief 1.5-kilometre drive. The neighbourhood is exceptionally well-connected by primary road networks and public transport systems, ensuring seamless accessibility to the major IT parks, business hubs, and surrounding entertainment choices of Bangalore.

Embrace the convenience of this location, where all your needs are within reach.
